image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: What if I told you that tiny components hold the power to shape our devices?
Context visual: Meet capacitors. They store energy in electric fields, crucial for so many circuits.
Escalation visual: Ever wonder how your phone charges so fast? That's the magic of capacitors at work.
Evidence visual: They smooth out power fluctuations, keeping everything running smoothly.
Payoff visual: Without them, circuits would be chaotic, and your favorite devices? Unusable.
Cta visual: Curious to learn more about the secrets of electronics? Hit that follow!
